reason: Check runtime settlement, project/script status, automation scheduling, and persistence invariants.
Check shared bridge types and all boundary implementations remain synchronized.
Check required type-check and build quality gates.
Check true non-zero exits remain failures and lifecycle cleanup behavior is unchanged.
Check process results remain attributable to the correct script and run.
Check automationRunId survives every layer and exact recovery round-trip.
Check no stale script-only result lookup or duplicated identity logic remains.
